description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building set within a landscaped plot featuring a driveway, multiple trees, and manicured lawns. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines with a flat roof and large windows, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The property includes a detached garage, a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, and a shaded patio area with pergolas. Two rectangular water features are situated in the front yard, adding to the aesthetic appeal. The outdoor spaces are well-defined with hedges, shrubs, and a row of evenly spaced spherical bushes. The overall design integrates indoor and outdoor living, with open spaces and clear visual connections between the house and its surroundings.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a detached garage, and water features, all set within a well-organized urban plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, water features, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and bushes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, patio with pergola, and the linear arrangement of trees along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, shaded patio area, and the open layout connecting indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, driveway, and the arrangement of water features and garden elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
